name: libwww-curl-perl
title: libwww-curl-perl
description:
Perl bindings to libcurl
WWW::Curl is a collection of Perl modules which contain Perl bindings to
libcurl. In Debian, more information on how the curl library can be used in
your applications is available in the libcurl4-doc Debian package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libwww-curl-perl because Perl bindings to libcurl.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libwww-curl-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libwww-curl-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libwww-curl-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
